decks.notes: The main idea of this deck is to control the game by utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat in powerful creatures and disrupting the opponent's strategy with cards like Cataclysm and Swords to Plowshares. The deck also includes land destruction elements with cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port, while maintaining card advantage through Sylvan Library. The strategy revolves around efficiently ramping up and out-valuing the opponent with a mix of control, disruption, and powerful creatures like Terravore and Exalted Angel.

The deck focuses on quickly assembling the Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle combo, which allows for a powerful board presence while denying the opponent's interaction. The deck includes a variety of cantrips and counterspells to protect the combo pieces and disrupt the opponent's game plan. It also includes cards like Opt and Gush to help dig through the deck for key pieces. The goal is to efficiently control the game and quickly close it out with the combo to secure victory.

The main concept of this deck is to use Oath of Druids to cheat big creatures like Terravore into play quickly, while controlling the game with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Cataclysm. The deck also includes cards like Sylvan Library and Seal of Cleansing to provide additional control and card selection. The mana base is designed to support this strategy by including cards like Wasteland and Gemstone Mine. Overall, this deck aims to disrupt the opponent's strategy while establishing a dominant board presence with powerful creatures.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent through countering and disrupting their plays while working towards assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat. The deck includes various card draw and manipulation spells to find the combo pieces quickly and protect them once they are on the battlefield. With a low land count and a high number of spell cards, the deck aims to outmaneuver and outpace the opponent while setting up an unbeatable win condition.

The core strategy of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a relentless stream of fast and aggressive Goblin creatures. With cards like Goblin Lackey and Goblin Matron to quickly get more Goblins onto the battlefield, along with support from Goblin Warchief to lower their casting costs and Goblin King to boost their power, this deck aims to swarm the opponent and deal damage quickly. Cards like Siege-Gang Commander and Goblin Piledriver provide additional power and reach, while cards like Wasteland and Rishadan Port disrupt the opponent's mana base to further tilt the advantage in your favor.

The main concept of this Mono Black Control deck is to disrupt the opponent's game plan while maintaining card advantage and controlling the board through cards like Contamination, Duress, and Cabal Therapy. The deck aims to control the game by utilizing efficient removal spells like Smother and Innocent Blood, while generating value through cards like Zombie Infestation and Skeletal Scrying. The deck also includes disruptive lands like Rishadan Port and Wasteland to slow down the opponent's mana development. Overall, this deck focuses on resource management and disruption to outlast the opponent and secure victory.

The deck focuses on using the graveyard as a resource to quickly assemble a board state that can overwhelm the opponent. By utilizing cards like Attunement and Intuition to fill the graveyard, the player can then use Replenish to bring back key enchantments like Opalescence and Parallax Wave. This allows for a powerful combo where the enchantments turn creatures into threats or provide control elements. Cards like Decree of Silence and Meddling Mage help disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Seal of Cleansing and Tsabo's Web provide additional utility.

The main concept of this deck is to aggressively apply pressure on the opponent by quickly playing creatures like Wild Mongrel and Basking Rootwalla, while efficiently removing threats with burn spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate. The deck also aims to utilize cards like Quirion Dryad and Survival of the Fittest to generate card advantage and maintain board presence. With its efficient curve and strong removal suite, this deck is well positioned to overwhelm opponents in the early game and maintain pressure throughout the match.

The deck focuses on controlling the game by denying the opponent resources through counterspells and removal spells while maintaining card advantage with cards like Standstill and Fact or Fiction. The key strategy is to control the board with land destruction effects like Dust Bowl and Powder Keg, while also being able to generate threats with creature lands like Mishra's Factory and Faerie Conclave. The deck seeks to grind out the opponent by using a combination of efficient removal, counter magic, and card advantage to outvalue the opponent.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game using cards like Sphere of Resistance and Winter's Grasp while utilizing Oath of Druids to cheat out powerful creatures like Terravore. The deck also includes disruption with cards like Swords to Plowshares and Wasteland to slow down the opponent's game plan. The mana base is designed to support the control elements of the deck while providing the necessary colors for spells. Overall, the goal is to establish control of the game early on and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures and disruptive spells.

The main focus of this deck is to utilize enchantresses and enchantment spells to quickly assemble a powerful combo that can overwhelm the opponent. By drawing cards every time an enchantment enters the battlefield, the deck aims to set up key pieces like Opalescence and Parallax Wave to create an almost unbeatable board state. With card filtering from cards like Mirri's Guile and strong ramp from cards like Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, the deck is able to quickly establish board presence and control the game to victory.

The main concept of this deck is to generate large amounts of mana by enchanting lands with Wild Growth and Serra's Sanctum, drawing cards with Enchantress's Presence, and controlling the board with Parallax Wave and Sterling Grove. The deck utilizes the combo potential of Opalescence and Replenish to turn enchantments into creature threats, while also using Solitary Confinement and Seal of Cleansing for protection and removal. The strategy revolves around creating a powerful board state and overwhelming the opponent with a strong enchantress presence.

The main idea of this deck is to overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and powerful burn spells. By utilizing efficient creatures like Basking Rootwalla and Wild Mongrel, along with removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Incinerate, you aim to quickly reduce your opponent's life total to zero. Survival of the Fittest allows you to tutor for the creatures you need, while cards like Call of the Herd provide additional threats. This deck focuses on a fast-paced, proactive strategy to win the game before your opponent can establish their own game plan.

The main focus of this deck is to quickly assemble the combo of playing Phyrexian Dreadnought and using Stifle to counter its sacrifice trigger, allowing for a powerful 12/12 creature to remain on the battlefield for only one mana. The deck includes a variety of card draw and disruption spells to help find and protect the combo pieces, while also including some counter spells and removal to control the opponent's game plan. The goal is to efficiently set up the combo and overwhelm the opponent before they can establish their own strategy.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and disruptive lands like Wasteland and Dust Bowl. The key strategy involves using Standstill to slow down the opponent's card advantage while also generating value through cards like Fact or Fiction and Decree of Justice. The win conditions of the deck include Mishra's Factory, Faerie Conclave, and Exalted Angel to beat down opponents gradually while maintaining control of the board. With a mix of control elements and efficient threats, this deck aims to outlast and outvalue the opponent in a grindy match-up.

The deck is focused on assembling the combo of Phyrexian Dreadnought and Stifle to create a powerful threat while stifling the opponent's ability to respond effectively. With cards like Opt, Gush, Vision Charm, and Portent providing card selection and card advantage, the deck aims to quickly find and protect the combo pieces. Counterspells like Counterspell and Foil are included to protect the combo from disruption, while disruptive cards like Daze and Misdirection help to keep the opponent off balance. Overall, the deck aims to efficiently execute its game plan while denying the opponent's strategies.
